title: Day 7 Decision Rules — Jun 25, 2026

rules.APPROVE_FULL_183_PRUNING_if: sitemap is technically safe AND at least 2 Phase 32 URLs are crawled or indexed AND DNI is stable or decreasing
rules.APPROVE_25_URL_TEST_PRUNING_if: sitemap is technically safe BUT 0-1 Phase 32 URLs crawled AND DNI is stable
rules.HOLD_PRUNING_if: sitemap has regressed OR DNI is increasing sharply OR Google reports new errors

rules.APPROVE_MAX_5_DEPLOY_if: at least 1 Phase 32 URL is crawled or indexed AND sitemap is technically safe AND DNI is stable or decreasing AND no Phase 31 traffic harm AND all Batch 2 pages score 90+ with SAFE doorway classification
rules.ALLOW_BATCH_2_STAGING_ONLY_if: some progress but not all conditions met (e.g., 1 URL discovered but none crawled)
rules.BLOCK_BATCH_2_if: 0 Phase 32 URLs crawled or indexed OR sitemap regression OR DNI increasing

current_assessment: At ~21 hours: 0 crawled, 0 indexed. If this holds until Day 7, both pruning and Batch 2 will be HELD/BLOCKED. If 2+ URLs are crawled by Day 7, pruning can proceed. If 1+ indexed + impressions appear, Batch 2 staging can be approved.
